slides.intent: Title cover: MRO Market Sizing — Surface Vessel Opportunities, dated April 2026.
Two-column overview: Context (why MRO now — shipyard standup, ASV expertise, customer pull) and Objectives (quantify TAM, segment, recommend beachhead).
Hero chart of overall US surface-vessel MRO TAM by year (FY26–FY30), with rationale bullets on the right and a one-line conclusion. Preliminary badge.
Sectioned table breaking the TAM into vessel-class segments (autonomous USVs, USN combatants, USCG cutters, commercial workboats), each with annual spend, vessel count, and primary customer.
Attribute-rows comparison of our shipyard capacity (drydock, berth, workforce, certifications) against each vessel class — green/red verdicts on fit.
Recommendation tiles for three near-term beachhead opportunities (e.g., USV fleet sustainment, USCG WPC mid-life, commercial OSV refits).
Closing slide with next-step actions: customer discovery, capacity model, certification roadmap.
